petitions.title: Establish Universal Basic Compute Right
petitions.description: Petition to establish a Universal Basic Compute Right guaranteeing all verified citizens access to a baseline allocation of compute resources on the public network for personal projects, learning, and civic participation.

petitions.title: Mandate Open-Source Requirement for Public Infrastructure Contracts
petitions.description: Require all infrastructure contracts funded by the Treasury to release their core protocol code under an OSI-approved license within 180 days of deployment.

petitions.title: Establish Regional Ambassador Program for Underrepresented Regions
petitions.description: Create a funded Regional Ambassador Program to support citizen onboarding, local node operation, and community building in Africa, South America, and Southeast Asia.

petitions.title: Extend Compute Rollover Cap to 2,000 Hours
petitions.description: Petition to raise the Universal Basic Compute rollover cap from 1,500 to 2,000 compute-hours so citizens can accumulate surplus across quarters.

feedback.title: Passport Verification Flow Confusing
feedback.subject: Passport verification steps unclear for new citizens
feedback.description: New citizens report confusion during the passport verification flow. The multi-step process with cryptographic proofs is not well explained. Suggest adding a guided walkthrough or video tutorial.

feedback.title: Mobile Navigation Menu Issue
feedback.subject: Hamburger menu doesn't close after selection on mobile
feedback.description: On mobile devices, the navigation menu remains open after tapping a link. Users must manually tap the close button or outside the menu.

feedback.title: Pathfinder Tool: Missing Contribution Areas
feedback.subject: Pathfinder doesn't include Research or Education paths
feedback.description: The Contribution Path Finder on tools.html lacks options for Research and Education contribution areas. Many citizens with academic backgrounds would benefit from these paths.

feedback.title: Passport Page Load Performance
feedback.subject: Passport page takes >3s to load on slower connections
feedback.description: The passport.html page has heavy assets that cause slow load times. Consider lazy-loading non-critical resources and optimizing the visual elements.

governanceActions.title: Civic Assembly Session #12 — Protocol Standards Ratification
governanceActions.description: Ratification of the Inter-Network Interoperability Protocol (INIP) v2.1 and Cross-Chain Identity Bridge Protocol (CCIBP) v1.2.

governanceActions.title: Executive Directive: Emergency Node Security Patch
governanceActions.description: Mandatory security patch deployment for all public nodes addressing CVE-2026-XXXX in the consensus layer. Deadline: 2026-07-05.

governanceActions.title: Ministry of Infrastructure: Q2 Network Capacity Report
governanceActions.description: Published quarterly report showing 23% increase in network throughput, 3 new regional clusters online, and 99.7% uptime across core infrastructure.

governanceActions.title: Referendum: Digital Sovereignty Charter Amendment
governanceActions.description: Proposed amendment to Article 4 of the Digital Sovereignty Charter regarding cross-network citizenship recognition. Voting opens 2026-07-10.

governanceActions.title: Civic Assembly Session #13 — Budget & Treasury Allocation
governanceActions.description: Deliberation on Q3 2026 budget proposal including infrastructure grants, developer bounties, and regional ambassador program funding.
